arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Fernandes responds to Real Madrid interest; Liverpool make €150m Isak bid
arts.sum: Sunday's football transfer rumours, with updates on Bruno Fernandes, Alexander Isak, Rasmus Hojlund, Nico Williams & more.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer battle: Chelsea 'join race' for Ruben Amorim's Andre Onana replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United may have to brace themselves for competition from Chelsea in the summer transfer window for their ideal Andre Onana replacement.

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim could break 69-match streak with Andre Onana decision
arts.sum: Andre Onana is under pressure for his place in Manchester United's starting XI for the first time since he joined the club in the summer of 2023, with Ruben Amorim pondering a change

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall: I’ll keep being me in Newcastle’s bid for Champions League spot
arts.sum: The 47-year-old has worked with Eddie Howe for 17 years.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana has become a liability and Ruben Amorim dropping him might do the Man United goalkeeper some good, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Players are usually supportive of team-mates like goalkeeper Onana who are struggling for form. In training, there will be an arm around the shoulder.

arts.ttl: Amanda Staveley shows true colours with Newcastle United statement amid Spurs takeover decision
arts.sum: Speaking to ITV for their documentary All With Smiling Faces, Staveley admitted she feels part of a'special Newcastle family'. Those could include an investment in one of United's Premier League rivals, with talks having taken place with Tottenham Hotspur over potential involvement.

arts.ttl: DGW32 stats: More than 400,000 Triple-Captain Isak
arts.sum: More than 412,000 Fantasy Premier League managers have Triple-Captained Alexander Isak (£9.5m) for Double Gameweek 32 (DGW32), the 10th-highest total of all time. Triple Captain is the most-used chip for DGW32, played by over 447,000 managers overall, with 92 per cent of them selecting Isak.

arts.ttl: Greenwood’s Marseille form has BIG transfer implications for Man Utd as Barcelona watch on
arts.sum: Greenwood’s display was described thus: “As gifted as he can be – when he wants to be, and that’s increasingly rare – the former Man Utd player exasperates with his lack of seriousness. Greenwood’s Marseille form has HUGE transfer implications for Man Utd as Barcelona watch on

arts.ttl: Man Utd plot £200m summer transfer war chest by cashing in on FOUR Old Trafford stars
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Ruben Amorim will be tasked with overhauling his Manchester United squad this summer and could have a huge sum of money at his disposal to help him do so

arts.ttl: Man United have keen interest in 22-year-old who has previously turned them down
arts.sum: Manchester United are on signing the Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki at the end of the season. The 22-year-old has been linked with the move to Manchester United in the past, and a report from UnitedinFocus claims that the player has previously turned them down so that he can continue his development with regular football.
